name: empty-vocab-one-fault
description: DR3-2 (design rev 5, section 6, Major at design round 3): a VALID-but-EMPTY vocabulary file is a vocabulary FAULT, never a fan-out - one fault per empty vocabulary file, ZERO per-record discoveries. This vector is the red-first pin for the DR4-2 scoped detector edit; it MUST fail against the unfixed detector for exactly that reason, and the fix makes both implementations pass it.
